summary: Group Deals Multi-Unit & Deal of the Day testing complete. All 37 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: (1) Homepage Deal of the Day Hero with featured deal, progress, join button. (2) Homepage Group Deals section with 6 featured deal cards. (3) Group Deals list page showing X/Y units and Z buyers separately. (4) Deal detail page with units/buyers display, share buttons. (5) Join modal with quantity selector (+/- buttons, dynamic total). (6) Admin Group Deals page with Units/Buyers column, Set Featured/Featured toggle buttons. (7) Account Group Deals page with sidebar link added.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed campaigns for testing scenarios A, B, E, duplicate prevention, lock after finalize, Deal of the Day, and customer endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Deals Multi-Unit & Deal of the Day features verified. Key tests: (1) SCENARIO A SUCCESS: Create campaign, join 3 buyers with multi-unit (5+3+5=13 units), finalize creates 3 orders + VBO with total_quantity=13. (2) SCENARIO B FAILURE: Create campaign, partial join, cancel marks 'failed', process-refunds marks 'refunded'. (3) SCENARIO E MULTI-UNIT: 1 buyer 10 units + 1 buyer 5 units = 15 total, VBO total_quantity=15, buyer_count=2. (4) DUPLICATE JOIN PREVENTION: Same phone on same campaign returns 400 'already joined'. (5) CAMPAIGN LOCK AFTER FINALIZE: Finalized campaign rejects new joins with 400 'no longer accepting'. (6) DEAL OF THE DAY: set-featured (only 1 at a time), unset-featured, /api/public/group-deals/deal-of-the-day returns featured deal or null. (7) CUSTOMER ENDPOINT: /api/customer/group-deals?phone=X returns commitments with campaign data. (8) PUBLIC ENDPOINTS: /api/public/group-deals, /featured, /{id} hide internal fields (vendor_cost, margin_per_unit, etc) but show buyer_count. Frontend: Homepage shows Deal of the Day Hero + Group Deals section. Deal cards show 'X/Y units' and 'Z buyers' separately. Join modal has quantity selector with +/- buttons and dynamic total. Admin shows Units/Buyers column and Featured toggle. Customer sidebar now has Group Deals link.

details: Threshold met flag set when threshold reached
Second join with same phone returns 400
Only 1 featured at a time (unfeatured others)
Internal fields hidden in public response
Hero section visible when featured deal exists
Shows product name, price, discount, progress
Shows buyers count and time remaining
Cards show X/Y units and Z buyers separately
Set Featured button for non-featured campaigns
Empty state with 'Browse Group Deals' link
Sidebar link added to customer portal
